note: AUD5 fix for finding F-12 (docs/novakai/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: .mjs TOOLING — real verification is node --test tools/novakai/approve-export.test.mjs (the verdict-less --accepted-only refusal failed pre-fix).

intent.problem: AUD3 T7: the E1 approval-artifact emitter was ALLOW-only — no test asserted any rejection or non-zero exit; and --accepted-only on a plan with NO verdicts map silently exported EVERY change (the opposite of the flag's promise).
intent.approach: behavior fix: approveExport throws (CLI exit 2, nothing emitted) when acceptedOnly is set and the plan carries no verdicts map. Tests: missing args -> 2, unreadable plan -> 2, verdict-less --accepted-only -> 2 + no artifact (red pre-fix), all-rejected -> 0 with an explicitly empty artifact. Header documents the boundary.
intent.rationale: all-rejected is a valid human decision (explicit empty artifact, exit 0); verdict-less accepted-only is an over-trust bug, not a decision — it must refuse.
